name: Eggs Hussarde
recipeIngredient: 2 large tomatoes, sliced and kept warm
recipeInstructions:
1. Grill the ham slices until very hot.
2. Place a slice of ham on each half english muffin.
3. Add a tomato slice to each.
4. Spoon some marchand de vin sauce over each.
5. Top with a poached egg.
6. Drizzle hollandaise sauce over the eggs.
7. Garnish with paprika.
Eggs Hussarde No. 2548 Yields 4 Servings
